domain_ssot_statement: Ash is an EN-to-KO translation subtitle-machine domain system. WCTX smoke cases prioritize English source cue preservation, Korean target subtitle wording, timing/cue invariants, compression, line breaks, speaker/register continuity, terminology consistency, and no-hallucinated translation.
prior_bake_invalidated_reason: Previous WCTX-01 bake used broad subtitle_machine domain; user-corrected SSOT is EN-to-KO translation subtitle-machine domain.
